forge-build-gate.description: Verify project compiles with Forge, attempt fix if failed

check.name: Forge Build Check
check.description: Run forge build and check for errors
check.prompt: mkdir -p magic; rm -f magic/BUILD_FAILED.txt magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md; if [ -f package.json ] && [ ! -d node_modules ]; then echo 'Installing npm dependencies...'; npm install --loglevel=error; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo 'npm install failed' > magic/BUILD_FAILED.txt; exit 0; fi; fi; forge build -o out --build-info > magic/build-output.log 2>&1; status=$?; cat magic/build-output.log; if [ $status -ne 0 ]; then echo BUILD_FAILED > magic/BUILD_FAILED.txt; fi

fix.name: Forge Build Fix
fix.prompt: Run 'forge build -o out' to verify the code compiles successfully. If there are compilation errors, fix them and run 'forge build -o out' again until the code compiles without errors.

onFailure.name: Generate Failure Report
onFailure.description: Generate a user-readable failure report when gate fails
onFailure.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/generate-failure-report.md. Run exclusively the generate-failure-report agent to create magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md explaining what failed and how to fix it.

mock-test-gate.description: Mock gate for testing - passes after one fix attempt. Run in a repo WITHOUT magic/MOCK_GATE_OK.txt to see the full check→fix→pass cycle.

check.name: Mock Gate Check
check.prompt: mkdir -p magic; rm -f magic/MOCK_GATE_FAILED.txt; if [ -f magic/MOCK_GATE_OK.txt ]; then echo 'MOCK GATE: OK file found, gate passes'; else echo 'MOCK GATE: OK file NOT found, gate fails'; echo MOCK_GATE_FAILED > magic/MOCK_GATE_FAILED.txt; fi

fix.name: Mock Gate Fix
fix.description: Create the OK file so the gate passes on re-check
fix.prompt: mkdir -p magic; echo 'MOCK GATE: Creating OK file as fix'; echo OK > magic/MOCK_GATE_OK.txt; rm -f magic/MOCK_GATE_FAILED.txt; echo 'MOCK GATE: Fix applied'

mock-test-gate-fail.description: Mock gate that ALWAYS fails - for testing gate failure UI. The fix step intentionally does not resolve the issue.

check.name: Mock Gate Check (Always Fails)
check.prompt: mkdir -p magic; echo 'MOCK GATE FAIL: Writing failure marker (this gate always fails)'; echo MOCK_GATE_FAILED > magic/MOCK_GATE_FAILED.txt

fix.name: Mock Gate Fix (Intentionally Broken)
fix.description: Pretends to fix but does not actually resolve the issue
fix.prompt: echo 'MOCK GATE FAIL: Pretending to fix... (intentionally not removing failure marker)'; sleep 1; echo 'MOCK GATE FAIL: Fix attempt complete (still broken)'

onFailure.name: Mock Gate Failure Report
onFailure.prompt:
mkdir -p magic; echo '# Mock Gate Failure Report

The mock-test-gate-fail gate failed intentionally.
This is a test gate used to verify gate failure UI.' > magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md; echo 'MOCK GATE FAIL: Failure report written to magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md'

echidna-run-gate.description: Run Echidna and verify it completes successfully, attempt fix if failed

check.name: Run Echidna
check.description: Run Echidna to test the fuzzing setup and save logs
check.prompt: rm -rf echidna/*.txt magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md 2>/dev/null; (echidna . --contract CryticTester --config echidna.yaml --format text --test-limit 50000 --disable-slither --test-mode exploration 2>&1 | tee magic/echidna-output.log) || true; mkdir -p magic/logs && (find . -name '*.txt' -path '*/echidna/*' -exec cp {} magic/logs/ \; 2>/dev/null || true)

fix.name: Fix Echidna Failure
fix.description: Resolve issues preventing Echidna from running successfully
fix.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/fix-echidna-failures.md. Exclusively run the fix-echidna-failures agent using the Task tool. This agent will analyze the saved Echidna logs and implement fixes to resolve the issues.

onFailure.name: Generate Failure Report
onFailure.description: Generate a user-readable failure report when gate fails
onFailure.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/generate-failure-report.md. Run exclusively the generate-failure-report agent to create magic/WORKFLOW_FAILURE_REPORT.md explaining what failed and how to fix it.
